display.purpose: App header only. Tight letter-spacing for confident lockup.

body.purpose: Primary reading text. Max 65ch line length.

label.purpose: Tags, status text, hints, secondary labels.

shadows.name: card-rest
shadows.purpose: Subtle card definition on off-white background.

shadows.name: summary-lift
shadows.purpose: Summary card only. Signals the final action zone.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default easing for state transitions (hover, focus, color shifts).

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Primary call-to-action. Full-width on mobile, inline on desktop.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 6px; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 600; padding: 12px 24px; border-radius: 12px; border: none; cursor: pointer; background: #10b981; color: #fff; transition: background 0.15s; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #059669; } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Secondary action. White background with green border.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 6px; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 600; padding: 12px 24px; border-radius: 12px; cursor: pointer; background: #fff; color: #374151; border: 1.5px solid #10b981; transition: background 0.15s; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif; } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: #d1fae5; } .ds-btn-outline:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Input Field
components.description: Text input for participant names and guest names.
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #e5e7eb; border-radius: 8px; font-size: 14px; outline: none; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif; box-sizing: border-box; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #10b981; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #d1fae5; }

components.name: Participant Chip
components.description: Participant name tag with remove button.
components.css: .ds-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; background: #d1fae5; color: #059669; padding: 4px 10px; border-radius: 20px; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif; } .ds-chip-remove { background: none; border: none; color: #059669; cursor: pointer; font-size: 16px; line-height: 1; padding: 0 2px; }

components.name: Item Card
components.description: Receipt item row. Tappable to assign participants.
components.css: .ds-item-card { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; width: 100%; padding: 12px; border: 1px solid #e5e7eb; border-radius: 10px; background: #fff; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.15s; text-align: left; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif; font-size: inherit; } .ds-item-card:hover { border-color: #10b981; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #d1fae5; } .ds-item-name { flex: 1; font-weight: 500; font-size: 14px; } .ds-item-price { font-weight: 600; font-size: 14px; color: #374151; white-space: nowrap; }

components.name: Bottom Sheet Modal
components.description: Bottom-sheet modal for assigning items to participants.
components.html:
Nasi Goreng

Rp35.000

Siapa aja yang pesan ini?
components.css: .ds-modal-overlay { position: fixed; inset: 0; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.4); display: flex; align-items: flex-end; z-index: 100; } .ds-modal-content { width: 100%; max-width: 480px; margin: 0 auto; background: #fff; border-radius: 16px 16px 0 0; padding: 24px; } .ds-modal-header { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 4px; } .ds-modal-header h3 { font-size: 17px; font-weight: 600; margin: 0; } .ds-modal-price { font-weight: 700; font-size: 17px; color: #059669; } .ds-modal-hint { font-size: 13px; color: #9ca3af; margin-bottom: 16px; }

narrative.overview: Everyone tosses their share into the jar — casual, communal, done. AntiNgutang's visual system is a clean, mobile-first interface that feels like a helpful friend handling the math. White surfaces, a fresh green accent, and generous rounded corners create a space that's approachable without being childish, efficient without feeling cold. The system explicitly rejects: gamified or cartoonish bill splitters, corporate banking aesthetics, and generic SaaS dashboard layouts. Every screen is built for one-handed use at a restaurant table — big tap targets, bottom-sheet modals, minimal scroll.
keyCharacteristics: Clean white surfaces with a single fresh green accent
Generous rounded corners (12px default) for approachability
Flat by default — borders and spacing create hierarchy, not shadows
Indonesian warmth in tone, not in decoration

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: Fresh Green is the only accent color. It appears on ≤15% of any screen — buttons, tags, focus rings. Its rarity is the point: when green appears, it means 'act here' or 'this is done.'

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Borders create card boundaries; shadows appear only as a deliberate signal (the summary card's lift). No shadow on hover, no shadow on cards.

dos: Do use Fresh Green as the single accent — on buttons, focus rings, tags, and selected states only.
Do keep cards flat with a 1px border. Let the border define the card boundary.
Do use bottom-sheet modals for mobile interactions — they feel native and keep the user in context.
Do use the system font stack for maximum performance and native feel.
Do keep tap targets at least 44px for thumb-friendly interaction.
Do use proportional spacing (16px card padding, 12px between items) for consistent rhythm.
donts: Don't use green decoratively — it must always signal action or completion.
Don't add shadows to cards at rest. Borders define boundaries.
Don't use gradient text, glassmorphism, or side-stripe borders.
Don't gamify the interface — no badges, progress bars, or animations that feel like a game.
Don't use numbered section markers (01 / 02 / 03) or tiny uppercase tracked eyebrows.
Don't use gray text on colored backgrounds — use a darker shade of the background's own hue instead.
Don't nest cards — cards are single-layer containers.
